title: ConvertKit vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ConvertKit and Moosend email marketing tools. See pricing, features, ratings, and which is best for your needs.
intro: ConvertKit and Moosend are both popular freemium email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences with distinct strengths. ConvertKit focuses on creators and course sellers with built-in commerce features, while Moosend appeals to small businesses seeking affordable, unlimited email sending. Choosing between them depends on your primary use case and budget.
choose_a_if: You're a creator, blogger, or course seller needing built-in commerce and product features
You want visual automation builders for complex workflows
You prioritize subscriber tagging and segmentation for creators
choose_b_if: You need unlimited email sending at the lowest possible cost
You're a small business wanting better overall customer ratings and support
You want real-time analytics and A/B testing with budget efficiency

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ConvertKit excels for creators with commerce features and visual automation, while Moosend wins on price and unlimited emails. Moosend has higher customer satisfaction ratings (4.7 on G2 vs 4.4), but ConvertKit's specialized features justify premium pricing for its target audience.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month compared to ConvertKit's $29/month. More importantly, Moosend offers unlimited emails even on paid plans, while ConvertKit limits email volume by plan, making Moosend the clear winner for cost-conscious businesses.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support subscriber list imports and exports. Most email marketing tools allow you to download your contacts and upload them to another platform, though you may lose some platform-specific data like automation history. Plan the migration carefully to avoid interrupting your email campaigns.
